first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (7/10), and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. The justification, strengths, and concerns are rephrased but convey the exact same core message: strong technical breadth, good initiative, but lacking in high-level AI/cloud strategy and an advanced degree. The minor variations in wording are well within the bounds of typical run-to-run noise and do not indicate any bias related to the change in university.
